title: Add bead deletion auto-commit in storage
description: Extend RepositoryStorage deletion flow so bead file removals are staged and committed immediately with the same best-effort and serialized git behavior used for write commits.
acceptance_criteria: RepositoryStorage defines a deletion-specific git commit helper or equivalent focused path for removed bead files.
delete_bead stages bead file removal and creates an immediate git commit after successful deletion cleanup.
Deletion auto-commit reuses the same git serialization strategy as write auto-commit.
Deletion-related git failures remain silent and do not block bead removal.
